changes.value:
## What
Remove geometry fields (x, y, width, height) from `WindowBoardEntry` â€” the `tauri-plugin-window-state` plugin handles all position/size persistence via `.window-state.json`. Our custom `window_boards` only needs to track which windows exist and what board each shows.

### Files
- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` â€” Remove geometry fields from `WindowBoardEntry` struct (lines 228-235)
- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” Remove `save_window_geometry` command (lines 870-887); simplify `create_window` entry construction (line 769); remove manual `.position()`/`.inner_size()` from `restore_windows` (lines 836-848)
- `kanban-app/src/main.rs` â€” Remove `save_window_geometry` from invoke_handler (line 91); gut Moved/Resized geometry-saving in `on_window_event` (lines 200-218)

### Subtasks
- [ ] Remove x, y, width, height from `WindowBoardEntry` struct
- [ ] Delete `save_window_geometry` command and its registration
- [ ] Simplify `create_window` to not store geometry
- [ ] Simplify `restore_windows` to create with defaults (plugin restores geometry)
- [ ] Remove geometry-saving from `on_window_event` Moved/Resized handler
- [ ] Update tests: remove `make_window_entry_with_pos`, delete geometry-specific tests, update lifecycle test
- [ ] `cargo nextest run` passes

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `WindowBoardEntry` has only `board_path` field
- [ ] No geometry-related code in create_window, restore_windows, or on_window_event
- [ ] `save_window_geometry` command no longer exists
- [ ] All tests pass with `cargo nextest run`
- [ ] Old config files with geometry fields deserialize without error (serde ignores extra fields)

## Tests
- [ ] Existing tests updated/removed to match new struct shape
- [ ] `test_window_boards_persists_through_serialization` still passes (board_path only)
- [ ] `test_window_boards_defaults_to_empty` still passes
- [ ] `test_window_boards_remove_by_board_path` still passes
- [ ] `cargo nextest run` â€” full suite green
Simplify WindowBoardEntry to board mapping only

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,30 +1,31 @@
 ## What
-Remove geometry fields (x, y, width, height) from `WindowBoardEntry` â€” the `tauri-plugin-window-state` plugin handles all position/size persistence via `.window-state.json`. Our custom `window_boards` only needs to track which windows exist and what board each shows.
+Remove the `tauri-plugin-window-state` plugin entirely. Handle all window geometry ourselves through `AppConfig`. This eliminates the dual-persistence race where the plugin and our custom `window_boards` both try to save/restore positions.

 ### Files
-- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` â€” Remove geometry fields from `WindowBoardEntry` struct (lines 228-235)
-- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” Remove `save_window_geometry` command (lines 870-887); simplify `create_window` entry construction (line 769); remove manual `.position()`/`.inner_size()` from `restore_windows` (lines 836-848)
-- `kanban-app/src/main.rs` â€” Remove `save_window_geometry` from invoke_handler (line 91); gut Moved/Resized geometry-saving in `on_window_event` (lines 200-218)
+- `kanban-app/Cargo.toml` â€” Remove `tauri-plugin-window-state` dependency
+- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` â€” Add `WindowGeometry { x, y, width, height, maximized }` struct; add `main_window: Option<WindowGeometry>` to `AppConfig`
+- `kanban-app/src/main.rs` â€” Remove plugin registration + `use` import; replace `win.restore_state(StateFlags::all())` with manual restore from `config.main_window`; extend `on_window_event` to save main window geometry on Moved/Resized (currently skips main)
+- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” Update `reset_windows` to clear `main_window` + `window_boards` in config instead of deleting `.window-state.json`

 ### Subtasks
-- [ ] Remove x, y, width, height from `WindowBoardEntry` struct
-- [ ] Delete `save_window_geometry` command and its registration
-- [ ] Simplify `create_window` to not store geometry
-- [ ] Simplify `restore_windows` to create with defaults (plugin restores geometry)
-- [ ] Remove geometry-saving from `on_window_event` Moved/Resized handler
-- [ ] Update tests: remove `make_window_entry_with_pos`, delete geometry-specific tests, update lifecycle test
+- [ ] Remove `tauri-plugin-window-state` from Cargo.toml
+- [ ] Remove plugin registration in main.rs (`.plugin(tauri_plugin_window_state::...)`)
+- [ ] Remove `use tauri_plugin_window_state::{StateFlags, WindowExt}` import
+- [ ] Add `WindowGeometry` struct (x: i32, y: i32, width: u32, height: u32, maximized: bool)
+- [ ] Add `main_window: Option<WindowGeometry>` to `AppConfig` with `#[serde(default)]`
+- [ ] In setup(), restore main window position/size from `config.main_window` before `win.show()`
+- [ ] Extend `on_window_event` Moved/Resized to also save main window geometry to `config.main_window`
+- [ ] Update `reset_windows` â€” clear config fields instead of deleting `.window-state.json`
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run` passes

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `WindowBoardEntry` has only `board_path` field
-- [ ] No geometry-related code in create_window, restore_windows, or on_window_event
-- [ ] `save_window_geometry` command no longer exists
-- [ ] All tests pass with `cargo nextest run`
-- [ ] Old config files with geometry fields deserialize without error (serde ignores extra fields)
+- [ ] `tauri-plugin-window-state` no longer in dependency tree
+- [ ] Main window position/size persists across restarts via `config.main_window`
+- [ ] Secondary windows still persist via existing `window_boards` geometry fields
+- [ ] `reset_windows` resets all window state and restarts cleanly
+- [ ] All tests pass

 ## Tests
-- [ ] Existing tests updated/removed to match new struct shape
-- [ ] `test_window_boards_persists_through_serialization` still passes (board_path only)
-- [ ] `test_window_boards_defaults_to_empty` still passes
-- [ ] `test_window_boards_remove_by_board_path` still passes
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run` â€” full suite green
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run` â€” full suite green
+- [ ] Manual: move main window, quit, restart â€” restores at same position
+- [ ] Manual: move secondary window, quit, restart â€” restores at same position
\ No newline at end of file

 ## What

+Remove geometry fields (x, y, width, height) from `WindowBoardEntry` â€” the `tauri-plugin-window-state` plugin handles all position/size persistence via `.window-state.json`. Our custom `window_boards` only needs to track which windows exist and what board each shows.

 ### Files
-- `kanban-app/Cargo.toml` â€” Remove `tauri-plugin-window-state` dependency
-- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` â€” Add `WindowGeometry { x, y, width, height, maximized }` struct; add `main_window: Option<WindowGeometry>` to `AppConfig`
-- `kanban-app/src/main.rs` â€” Remove plugin registration + `use` import; replace `win.restore_state(StateFlags::all())` with manual restore from `config.main_window`; extend `on_window_event` to save main window geometry on Moved/Resized (currently skips main)
-- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” Update `reset_windows` to clear `main_window` + `window_boards` in config instead of deleting `.window-state.json`
+- `kanban-app/src/state.rs` â€” Remove geometry fields from `WindowBoardEntry` struct (lines 228-235)
+- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` â€” Remove `save_window_geometry` command (lines 870-887); simplify `create_window` entry construction (line 769); remove manual `.position()`/`.inner_size()` from `restore_windows` (lines 836-848)
+- `kanban-app/src/main.rs` â€” Remove `save_window_geometry` from invoke_handler (line 91); gut Moved/Resized geometry-saving in `on_window_event` (lines 200-218)

 ### Subtasks
-- [ ] Remove `tauri-plugin-window-state` from Cargo.toml
-- [ ] Remove plugin registration in main.rs (`.plugin(tauri_plugin_window_state::...)`)
-- [ ] Remove `use tauri_plugin_window_state::{StateFlags, WindowExt}` import
-- [ ] Add `WindowGeometry` struct (x: i32, y: i32, width: u32, height: u32, maximized: bool)
-- [ ] Add `main_window: Option<WindowGeometry>` to `AppConfig` with `#[serde(default)]`
-- [ ] In setup(), restore main window position/size from `config.main_window` before `win.show()`
-- [ ] Extend `on_window_event` Moved/Resized to also save main window geometry to `config.main_window`
-- [ ] Update `reset_windows` â€” clear config fields instead of deleting `.window-state.json`
+- [ ] Remove x, y, width, height from `WindowBoardEntry` struct
+- [ ] Delete `save_window_geometry` command and its registration
+- [ ] Simplify `create_window` to not store geometry
+- [ ] Simplify `restore_windows` to create with defaults (plugin restores geometry)
+- [ ] Remove geometry-saving from `on_window_event` Moved/Resized handler
+- [ ] Update tests: remove `make_window_entry_with_pos`, delete geometry-specific tests, update lifecycle test
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run` passes

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `tauri-plugin-window-state` no longer in dependency tree
-- [ ] Main window position/size persists across restarts via `config.main_window`
-- [ ] Secondary windows still persist via existing `window_boards` geometry fields
-- [ ] `reset_windows` resets all window state and restarts cleanly
-- [ ] All tests pass
+- [ ] `WindowBoardEntry` has only `board_path` field
+- [ ] No geometry-related code in create_window, restore_windows, or on_window_event
+- [ ] `save_window_geometry` command no longer exists

+- [ ] Old config files with geometry fields deserialize without error (serde ignores extra fields)

 ## Tests

-- [ ] Manual: move secondary window, quit, restart â€” restores at same position
